palette_hint: Background #F5F0E8 (warm cream), body text #1A1A1A (near-black), accent #C0392B (deep red) for links and ruled lines, secondary accent #6B6B6B (mid-gray) for metadata and captions.
type_style: Headings in Georgia serif, bold weight for post titles; body text in system-ui or sans-serif at 18px, normal weight, with generous 1.8 line-height for a calm, readable feel.
description: Ink & Insomnia is the personal blog of Mara Solène, a late-night writer documenting her thoughts on literature, solitude, and city life in Montreal.
constraints: All content centered in a single column, max-width 640px, with auto left/right margins and 24px horizontal padding.
Page background is always #F5F0E8; no gradients, no box shadows, no border-radius on any element.
Horizontal rules between sections use a 1px solid #C0392B line with 32px vertical margin.
Navigation is a plain vertical or horizontal list of text links at the top, no borders or backgrounds, links colored #C0392B with no underline on hover.
Post metadata (date, category) displayed in #6B6B6B at 14px, placed directly below the post title with 8px gap.

page_specs.journal: The main blog feed showing the five most recent short journal entries, each with a bold Georgia title, a red-accented date in gray, and 3–4 sentences of body text about topics like a 2 a.m. walk on Rue Saint-Denis, a power outage, or a stray cat. Entries are separated by the red 1px horizontal rule. A plain text link 'Read older entries →' appears at the bottom in #C0392B.
page_specs.essays: A titled archive page listing Mara's longer essays, each shown as a title in bold Georgia, a one-sentence teaser in body text, and the word count in gray. Essays cover topics such as 'On Rereading Sebald in Winter,' 'The Quiet Violence of Open-Plan Offices,' and 'What Insomnia Teaches.' Each entry is separated by the red horizontal rule.
page_specs.reading-list: A curated page titled 'What I've Been Reading' organized into three plain text sections — Currently, Finished This Year, and Abandoned — each introduced by a bold all-caps label. Books are listed as plain unordered list items showing author and title, e.g. '— Annie Ernaux, The Years' and '— W.G. Sebald, Austerlitz,' with a short one-sentence note on select titles in gray italic.
page_specs.about: A single-column personal introduction page with a bold heading 'About Mara Solène' followed by three short paragraphs: one about her background as a former librarian turned freelance copywriter in Montreal, one about why she started this blog in 2019 during a sleepless February, and one about her interests in translation, film photography, and slow travel. Ends with a plain sentence linking to the contact page.
page_specs.contact: A minimal contact page with a bold heading 'Get in Touch,' two short paragraphs explaining Mara welcomes notes about books, writing commissions, and correspondence but does not accept sponsored posts, followed by her email address displayed as plain styled text (not a mailto link) in #C0392B at 20px, and her Mastodon handle in gray below it.
